'''gochangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaden|leaden]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaden|leaden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gochangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochangithi|gochangithi]] || [[word:gochangiji|gochangiji]] || [[word:gochangishi|gochangishi]] || [[word:gochangiki|gochangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochanguthuthu|gochanguthuthu]] || [[word:gochangujuju|gochangujuju]] || [[word:gochangushushu|gochangushushu]] || [[word:gochangukuku|gochangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochanguthu|gochanguthu]] || [[word:gochanguju|gochanguju]] || [[word:gochangushu|gochangushu]] || [[word:gochanguku|gochanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochangufthuf|gochangufthuf]] || [[word:gochangufjuf|gochangufjuf]] || [[word:gochangufshuf|gochangufshuf]] || [[word:gochangufkuf|gochangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochangethe|gochangethe]] || [[word:gochangeje|gochangeje]] || [[word:gochangeshe|gochangeshe]] || [[word:gochangeke|gochangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochangothotho|gochangothotho]] || [[word:gochangojojo|gochangojojo]] || [[word:gochangoshosho|gochangoshosho]] || [[word:gochangokoko|gochangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochangotho|gochangotho]] || [[word:gochangojo|gochangojo]] || [[word:gochangosho|gochangosho]] || [[word:gochangoko|gochangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochangofthof|gochangofthof]] || [[word:gochangofjof|gochangofjof]] || [[word:gochangofshof|gochangofshof]] || [[word:gochangofkof|gochangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfthĂŻf|gochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfjĂŻf|gochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfshĂŻf|gochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfkĂŻf|gochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|gochangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|gochangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|gochangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|gochangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfthĂŻf|gochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfjĂŻf|gochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfshĂŻf|gochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfkĂŻf|gochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfthĂŻf|gochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfjĂŻf|gochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfshĂŻf|gochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gochangĂŻfkĂŻf|gochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochangĂŠthĂŠ|gochangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gochangĂŠjĂŠ|gochangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gochangĂŠshĂŠ|gochangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gochangĂŠkĂŠ|gochangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochangathatha|gochangathatha]] || [[word:gochangajaja|gochangajaja]] || [[word:gochangashasha|gochangashasha]] || [[word:gochangakaka|gochangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochangatha|gochangatha]] || [[word:gochangaja|gochangaja]] || [[word:gochangasha|gochangasha]] || [[word:gochangaka|gochangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochangafthaf|gochangafthaf]] || [[word:gochangafjaf|gochangafjaf]] || [[word:gochangafshaf|gochangafshaf]] || [[word:gochangafkaf|gochangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gochangasha|gochangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochangshĂ«sha|gochangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochangrosha|gochangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochangmusha|gochangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochangyasha|gochangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochangnkshĂ«sha|gogochangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochangnkrosha|gogochangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochangnkmusha|gogochangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochangnkyasha|gogochangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gochachangasha|gochachangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochachangshĂ«sha|gochachangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochachangrosha|gochachangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachangmusha|gochachangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochachangyasha|gochachangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochachangnkshĂ«sha|gogochachangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochachangnkrosha|gogochachangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochachangnkmusha|gogochachangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochachangnkyasha|gogochachangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gechĂŠngasha|gechĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gechĂŠngshĂ«sha|gechĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gechĂŠngrosha|gechĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gechĂŠngmusha|gechĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gechĂŠngyasha|gechĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogechĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gogechĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogechĂŠngnkrosha|gogechĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogechĂŠngnkmusha|gogechĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogechĂŠngnkyasha|gogechĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gochfangasha|gochfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochfangshĂ«sha|gochfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochfangrosha|gochfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochfangmusha|gochfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochfangyasha|gochfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochfangnkshĂ«sha|gogochfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochfangnkrosha|gogochfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochfangnkmusha|gogochfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochfangnkyasha|gogochfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
